description: Confirm stg_employees has exactly 14 columns
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS col_count FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees'

description: Confirm employee_id column is INT64 type
query: SELECT data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND column_name = 'employee_id'

description: Confirm salary column is NUMERIC type
query: SELECT data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND column_name = 'salary'

description: Confirm hire_date column is DATE type
query: SELECT data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND column_name = 'hire_date'

description: Confirm created_date column is TIMESTAMP type
query: SELECT data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND column_name = 'created_date'

description: Confirm first_name, last_name, email, status are STRING
query: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND column_name IN ('first_name','last_name','email','status','phone_number','job_id')

description: Confirm commission_pct column is NUMERIC type
query: SELECT data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND column_name = 'commission_pct'

description: Confirm manager_id and department_id are INT64
query: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND column_name IN ('manager_id','department_id')

description: Confirm all 14 ICD-mapped columns present in target
query: SELECT column_name FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' ORDER BY column_name
expected_result: Returns all 14 columns: employee_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number, hire_date, job_id, salary, commission_pct, manager_id, department_id, status, created_date, updated_date

description: Confirm no null values in primary key column
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_count FROM `stg_employees` WHERE employee_id IS NULL

description: Confirm no duplicate employee_id values exist
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS dup_count FROM (SELECT employee_id FROM `stg_employees` GROUP BY employee_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)

description: Confirm no null values exist in email column
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_email FROM `stg_employees` WHERE email IS NULL

description: Confirm salary column has no negative values
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS neg_salary FROM `stg_employees` WHERE salary < 0

description: Confirm commission_pct values are between 0 and 1
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS invalid_pct FROM `stg_employees` WHERE commission_pct < 0 OR commission_pct > 1

description: Confirm no null values in hire_date column
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_hire_date FROM `stg_employees` WHERE hire_date IS NULL

description: Confirm partition column created_date has no nulls
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_created FROM `stg_employees` WHERE created_date IS NULL

description: Confirm target row count equals source row count
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS target_count FROM `stg_employees`
expected_result: target_count equals MySQL EMPLOYEES table row count

description: Confirm no null values in job_id column
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_job FROM `stg_employees` WHERE job_id IS NULL

description: Confirm hire_date values are not in the future
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS future_dates FROM `stg_employees` WHERE hire_date > CURRENT_DATE()

description: Confirm updated_date is not earlier than created_date
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS invalid_dates FROM `stg_employees` WHERE updated_date < created_date

test_name: Validate table is partitioned on created_date
description: Confirm stg_employees uses created_date as partition column
query: SELECT partition_column FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' LIMIT 1

description: Confirm partition is time-based using TIMESTAMP column
query: SELECT partition_type FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees'

description: Confirm at least one partition contains data after load
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS partition_count FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND total_rows > 0

test_name: Validate clustering on employee_id and department_id
description: Confirm cluster columns are employee_id and department_id
query: SELECT clustering_ordinal_position, column_name FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND clustering_ordinal_position IS NOT NULL ORDER BY clustering_ordinal_position
expected_result: Cluster columns include employee_id and department_id

test_name: Validate no data in null partition
description: Confirm no records land in null partition slot
query: SELECT SUM(total_rows) AS null_partition_rows FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS` WHERE table_name = 'stg_employees' AND partition_id = '__NULL__'

test_name: Validate partition pruning reduces query cost
description: Confirm partition filter on created_date limits bytes scanned
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `stg_employees` WHERE created_date BETWEEN TIMESTAMP('2024-01-01') AND TIMESTAMP('2024-01-31')
expected_result: Bytes processed limited to relevant partition only

test_name: Validate pipeline completes within one hour
description: Confirm end-to-end pipeline runtime is under 60 minutes
expected_result: Pipeline duration < 60 minutes from trigger to completion

description: Confirm DAG schedule interval is set to hourly
Confirm all DAG tasks complete with success status
expected_result: All task instances show state = 'success' in Airflow UI

description: Confirm pipeline runs without failure on 10GB input
expected_result: Pipeline completes successfully with 10GB data, no OOM or timeout errors

test_name: Validate pipeline runs in Dev environment
description: Confirm DAG executes successfully in Dev environment
expected_result: DAG run state = 'success' in Dev Airflow environment

description: Confirm DAG retries failed tasks before alerting
expected_result: Failed tasks retry at least once before final failure state

test_name: Validate no duplicate DAG runs overlap
description: Confirm max_active_runs prevents concurrent DAG executions
